appmesh.route.httproute.CfnAbout: An object that represents an HTTP or HTTP/2 route type.

appmesh.route.httproute.Action.Description: An object that represents the action to take if a match is determined.

appmesh.route.httproute.Match.Description: An object that represents the criteria for determining a request match.

appmesh.route.httproute.RetryPolicy.Description: An object that represents a retry policy.

appmesh.route.httproute.Timeout.Description: An object that represents types of timeouts.
